name: PDF Read
description: Read, analyze, extract, or summarize PDF files with metadata verification, type detection, chunked reading, and failure-transparent workflows.
author: Lucas
positioning: Treat PDF reading as a metadata-verified, page-scoped workflow instead of a one-shot guess.
core_value: Help users read PDFs safely with verified metadata, explicit scope, and transparent failure handling.
differentiation: Separates text PDFs from scanned PDFs before extraction
Uses chunked page ranges for medium and large files
Stops on failures instead of fabricating details
Treats OCR as opt-in and sample-validated
Keeps outputs grounded in processed pages only
